message:
feat(dashboard): add NTM_DASH_SCAN_REFRESH_SECS to configure/disable UBS scans

Users can now control UBS scan frequency via environment variable:
- NTM_DASH_SCAN_REFRESH_SECS=120  # scan every 2 minutes
- NTM_DASH_SCAN_REFRESH_SECS=0    # disable scanning entirely

Default remains 1 minute.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
